/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Core/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/GraphApp/GraphGrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/GraphApp/Pathfinding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/PaintApp/Canvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/PaintApp/PaintTools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Visualizer/CircleAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Visualizer/ClipAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Visualizer/EllipseAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Visualizer/FillAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Visualizer/LineAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Visualizer/SHAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Visualizer/TransformAlgos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Visualizer/VisualizerEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/Visualizer/WindowViewportAlgo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CGV_Project.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o -o CGV_Project  -lglfw -lGL -lm -ldl -lpthread
